name: Indian Spiced Green Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds green beans, trimmed, cut into 1/4 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add garlic and ginger, sauté until fragrant.
3. Add spices (cumin, coriander, turmeric) and stir for 30 seconds.
4. Add green beans and cook until tender, about 10 minutes.
5. Serve with rice or bread.
